nasb.text: But I have a baptism to undergo, and how distressed I am until it is accomplished!

esv.text: I have a baptism to be baptized with, and how great is my distress until it is accomplished!

cnv.text: 我有應當受的洗，我是多麼迫切地期待這事完成。

ccb.text: 我有要受的‘洗礼’，我何等迫切地想完成这‘洗礼’啊！

csbs.text: 不过我有该受的洗礼，在完成之前，我是多么困苦！
